channel.title: HackerNews 日本語まとめ & AI要約
channel.description: HackerNewsのトップ記事を毎日日本語翻訳・AI要約して配信

item.title: 2026年5月9日（23:00取得） HackerNews トップ記事
item.description: #1 Poland is now among the 20 largest economies. How it happened #2 An Introduction to Meshtastic #3 PC Engine CPU #4 A web page that shows you everything the browser told it without asking #5 Podman rootless containers and the Copy Fail exploit #6 Canvas is down as ShinyHunters threatens to leak schools’ data #7 Cloudflare to cut about 20% workforce #8 Tesla is recalling its cheaper Cybertruck because the wheels might fall off #9 GeoJSON #10 Maybe you shouldn't install new software for a bit
